metadata.summary: Universal .aegiside folder, multi-IDE support, Port 7777 MCP server

definition.core_directive: State shall ensure constitutional framework operates across all AI-powered IDEs: Windsurf, Cursor, VS Code with Cline, JetBrains AI Assistant, others
definition.universal_standards: 8-schema JSON format, MCP server protocol, constitutional articles, RL scoring system, democratic governance (all IDE-agnostic)

powers.ias_cabinet_secretary: Maintains universal standards across IDE implementations, coordinates MCP server (Port 7777), ensures schema compatibility, audits cross-IDE operations
powers.ias_researcher: Tests constitutional framework on multiple IDEs, documents IDE-specific adaptations, provides compatibility patterns, benchmarks cross-platform performance
powers.parliament: Approves IDE-specific adaptations (≥95% consensus), sets universal compatibility standards, mandates cross-platform testing

features: All IDEs connect via standard MCP protocol
Broadcasts schema updates to all connected IDEs
Maintains single source of truth (8-schema memory-bank)

implementation.folder_structure_mapping: Universal .aegiside/memory-bank/ maps to IDE-specific folders (Windsurf .windsurf/, Cursor .cursor/, VS Code .vscode/, JetBrains .idea/)
folder_initialization: 6. Sync with existing workspace if available

ide_lock_in.offense: Implementing IDE-specific features without universal fallback

mcp_server_bypass.offense: Direct schema modifications without server sync

violations.remediation: Test framework on 3 different IDEs, achieve 100% cross-platform compatibility, pass Cabinet Secretary audit, contribute compatibility patterns, restore privileges after parliamentary approval
